name: Lee Garman
desc: I first met Lee in 2009 when we were placed in the same first grade classroom. I have collected over 2000 photos and videos of Lee. This book collects my camera roll from April 06, 2013 - October 14, 2024.

name: Lunch Money
desc:
An unsatisfying answer to things not being satisfying.

Found image and text examining my obsession with Cartier's Tank Américaine Watch. Three books act through transliteration in connecting cultural and historical events with conversation on how image and text are created, shared, valued, and understood.

name: Root Beer
desc:
A collection of mementos gathered over a four-year period of a romantic relationship. 126 objects have been scanned and indexed.

For Emma

Cover design by Tilde Oyster

name: Ocean in a Bottle
desc: Diptychs documented between Pittsburgh, PA and Longneck, DE.
